productDisplayName: Just Natural Unisex Navy Blue Rain Jacket
description: Style noteLightweight and compact when not in use this waterproof jacket from just natural is ideal for rainy days. Elastication at the hood and bottom hem block water completely. It has multiple pockets inside and out, to help keep your monetary essentials dry.Product DetailsNavy and black rainwear jacket, detachable zipper and Velcro closure in front, two welt pockets with Velcro closures in front,  black panels near front side seams, patch extending from shoulder to sleeve, full sleeve with print on left sleeve, black piping at sleeve hem, paneled hood with grey front patch and clasp for rolling it away when not needed, print on left chest, adjustable and elasticated bottom and hood hem, mesh lining at chest with branded taping Material and carePolyesterMachine wash coldDo not iron Size and FitThe model (height 5'8"and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
